name: 15.7 fl oz Stoneware Mug - Spritz™
description:
Sip your favorite drinks in style with the 15.7 fl oz Stoneware Mug from Spritz™. Crafted from durable stoneware, its donut-themed design and crisp finish make it a delightful choice for your drinkware collection. The mug comfortably holds up to 15.7 ounces, perfect for keeping your beverages warm or cool, whether you're starting your morning or taking a moment to unwind.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
